calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petitioner Andrew Charles Galls Verified Petition To Confirm The Finra Dispute Resolution Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jun-01-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Patrick R. Mahoney, of Law Office of Patrick R. Mahoney, Tel. 213.805.5677, for petitioners, appearing via CourtCall;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER ANDREW CHARLES GALL'S Verified Petition To Confirm The Finra Dispute Resolution Arbitration Award is Granted, no opposition filed. Judgment signed in open court. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
